title: Frog Announce New Album Frog For Sale: Hear “Je Ne Sais Pas”
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:

The post Frog Announce New Album <em>Frog For Sale</em>: Hear “Je Ne Sais Pas” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Yes, that's right, Frog are announcing another new album. Last year the New York duo earned our Album Of The Week honor with 1000 Variations On The Same Song, and then they followed it up with The Count in September. Now Frog For Sale is slated for release next month.

"This is an album about how money sometimes gets in the way of love," Daniel Bateman explains. The eccentric storytelling is greater than ever on the lead single "Je Ne Sais Pas": "Jen I'm appalled that you never called/ I was passionate, bald, and enthralled." Beautiful. Listen below.

TRACKLIST:
01 "Bad Time To Fall In Love"
02 "Best Buy"
03 "Dark Out"
04 "Yonder This Way Comes"
05 "Stole My Heart"
06 "Max von Side-Eye"
07 "Lois Lane"
08 "All The Things You Get"
09 "Professional"
10 "Je Ne Sais Pas"
11 "Wish Upon a Falling Star"
12 "Beg, Borrow, Steal" 

TOUR DATES:
04/17 – Brooklyn, NY @ Elsewhere
04/18 – Philadelphia, PA @ Underground Arts 
04/19 – Washington, D.C. @ Black Cat
04/22 – Nashville, TN @ Cannery Hall
04/23 – Chicago, IL @ Thalia Hall
04/24 – Cleveland, OH @ Grog Shop
04/26 – Boston, MA @ Venue TBA

Frog For Sale is out 4/17 via Audio Antihero / Tape Wormies. Pre-order it here.
